title: cenostigma pinnatum
intro: Cenostigma pinnatum is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae and known for its medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and stems are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cenostigma pinnatum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and alleviating symptoms of common cold and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in traditional remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
